response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates exceptional technical mastery across the entire required stack—TypeScript, React, Node.js, databases, and cloud architecture—his profile as a Staff-level engineer with 15+ years of experience is fundamentally misaligned with an entry-level individual contributor position. His seniority, compensation expectations, and career trajectory suggest he would quickly outgrow the role and likely disengage, making this a poor retention risk despite technical fit.
strengths: Advanced fullstack expertise: React, Node.js/TypeScript, microservices architecture, and proven ability to build high-scale systems handling millions of requests
Strong software craftsmanship foundation: demonstrated commitment to TDD, CI/CD, clean architecture, and knowledge-sharing through multiple workshops and mentoring roles
Relevant AI/ML exposure: current work at re:cinq with LLM infrastructure and Model Context Protocol frameworks directly applicable to role's nice-to-haves
concerns: Severe seniority overqualification: 15+ years as Senior/Staff engineer vastly exceeds entry-level scope, creating retention and culture-fit risk
PostgreSQL experience not explicitly mentioned despite being preferred; resume shows MongoDB and MySQL focus instead
Limited explicit AWS infrastructure depth: AWS CDK mentioned but no specific hands-on experience with ECS, EKS, RDS, SQS, or Terraform listed
